# unch v0.3.1

`v0.3.1` is a stabilization release focused on packaging, platform support, and repository hardening. It keeps the `v0.3.0` search model and index behavior intact while making installs, releases, and CI much more production-friendly.

## Highlights

- adds multi-platform release assets for macOS, Linux, and Windows x86_64
- adds installer smoke checks in CI so published install paths are validated continuously
- keeps Unix builds on the existing native SQLite path while using a Windows-specific SQLite backend split for more reliable Windows packaging
- adds `SECURITY.md`, `CODEOWNERS`, CodeQL scanning, and Dependabot configuration
- updates GitHub Actions dependencies and expands the default CI matrix
- simplifies the README hero and keeps the top-level project docs cleaner

## Upgrade notes

- no index rebuild is required when upgrading from `v0.3.0`
- Homebrew users can upgrade with `brew upgrade unch`
- shell installer users can rerun the installer and optionally pin `-v v0.3.1`
- Windows x86_64 users can install from published release archives instead of requiring a local Go toolchain on the default path
